name: Invesco DB Precious Metals Fund
business: Invesco DB Precious Metals Fund is a commodity pool that seeks to track the DBIQ Optimum Yield Precious Metals Index Excess Return by investing in futures contracts on gold, platinum, and silver. The fund issues shares to authorized participants in creation units and is listed on NYSE Arca.
namedSuppliers: The Bank of New York Mellon (Administrator, Custodian, Transfer Agent)

exposures.sentence: Effective November 10, 2025, the Index comprised the following commodities: Gold, Platinum, and Silver (each, an Index Commodity, and collectively, the Index Commodities ).
